Name: Black Pudding*
Special: Only take FIRE dmg, Splits if hit by anything else. Split: 2HD Blob, 1d8 dmg.

Name: Blink Dog
Special: Blink in to attack then blink away 10-40'

Name: Displacer Beast
Special: -2 To hit and +2 save throws. Gain 1 bite when hp = 6 or lower. (Bite +2 hit 1d6 dmg)

Name: Djinni(Lesser)*
Special: A djinni can use each of its seven powers 3 times each day. These powers are: create food and drink (as a 7th level cleric); create metallic objects of up to 1,000 cn weight (of temporary duration, varying by type: gold = 1 day, iron = 1 round); create soft goods and wooden objects of up to 1,000 cn weight which are permanent; become invisible; assume gaseous form; form a whirlwind; create illusions (which affect both sight and hearing, lasting until touched or magically dispelled - the djinni need not concentrate to maintain them).

Name: Dryad
Damage: Spell charm person with -2 to Save

Name: Efreeti(Lesser)*
Special: An efreeti can create objects, create illusions, and turn invisible like a djinni. It can cast a wall of fire spell 3 times per day. An efreeti may also transform itself into a pillar of flame that will set fire to all flammable items within 5 feet. It can retain the flame shape for up to 3 rounds. When in this form, the fire adds 1-8 points of damage to each of the efreeti's blows.

Name: Fish, Giant Sturgeon
Special: Swallowed victim save VS Death Ray or be paralyzed

Name: Giant, Storm
Damage: 8d6 (Call lightning bolt, once every 5 rounds, current hp dmg Save vs Spells for 1/2 dmg)

Name: Golem*, Wood
Special: -1 to INIT, -2 To Save VS Fire and takes +1 dmg per die.
